overall.description: A character in a white coat walks through a dimly lit, futuristic industrial corridor lined with cryogenic storage pods and candles. The scene features atmospheric blue-cyan lighting and a somber sci-fi atmosphere, appearing to be from a high-quality narrative video game.

scene_state.functional_zone: cryogenic storage corridor with wall-mounted pods

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the corridor examining the cryogenic storage pods on both sides

notable_agents.action: standing still in the corridor facing the camera direction, wearing dark clothing

wall of numbered cryogenic storage pods with metal frames and latches
empty medical gurney with white sheet covering the surface
cluster of lit white candles placed on the metal floor between the pod walls
painted letters A-B and C on the concrete wall indicating storage sections

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor lined with cryogenic storage pods on both sides. Candles are scattered on the floor providing warm accent lighting against the blue overhead lights. A figure stands motionless on the left side as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: cryogenic storage corridor with side office entrance

events.description: passing an open doorway on the right revealing an office interior with a desk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the corridor past an open doorway leading to a side room

entered.detail: open doorway with white frame leading to an office room with visible desk and computer
metal desk with papers and equipment just inside the doorway
large industrial ventilation pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking through the corridor, passing an open doorway on the right that reveals an office interior. The medical gurney and initial wall markings are left behind as the corridor continues with alphabet markings appearing on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: cryogenic storage corridor end with alphabet markings

events.description: character reaches the corridor end and turns right to examine the pods on the side wall

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the corridor and turning to face the right wall with the B6-B7 pods

entered.detail: wall painted with alphabet ranges K-M, N-O, R-U, and W-Z indicating storage sections
solid metal wall at the terminus of the corridor with a door

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds to the end of the corridor, passing alphabet markings on the walls. Upon reaching the end wall, the character turns to examine the cryogenic pods on the right side, specifically the B6 and B7 units, before preparing to return.

scene_state.functional_zone: small office room with computer workstation

events.description: character enters the office room through the doorway, transitioning from corridor to interior space

agents.ego_description: walking back down the corridor and entering the office room on the right side

notable_agents.action: seated at a computer desk facing away from the door, working on the terminal

entered.detail: large desk with multiple computer monitors and office equipment
office chair with seated occupant positioned in front of the computer
metal doorway frame marking the transition from corridor to office

segments.scene_description: The character walks back toward the previously passed doorway and enters the office room. Inside, a figure sits at a computer desk working on a terminal. The environment shifts from the industrial corridor to a carpeted office space with computer equipment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a somber industrial corridor that eventually transitions into a private office space. It begins by following a character in a white coat through a narrow hallway lined with cryogenic pods and flickering candles, passing a motionless figure standing in the blue-cyan light. As the character advances, the scene shifts past an open doorway and along walls marked with alphabetical labels, moving toward the end of the corridor to examine the B6 and B7 storage units. The camera then pivots as the character turns back, retracing their steps toward the previously passed opening. Finally, the environment transforms from the cold industrial hall to a carpeted office interior as the character enters the room to find a figure working at a computer terminal.
